chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P.No.D-3071 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) For order as to maintainability of petition 13.10.2025 None present for the petitioner --------- On the very inception of this petition on 26.09.2024 a counsel was holding brief on behalf of learned counsel for the petitioner. On the last date of hearing i.e. 09.10.2024, once-again a counsel held brief on behalf of learned counsel for the petitioner. Learned counsel for the petitioner has never appeared in this case diligently and the question of maintainability still remains outstanding. Once-again, today, none present for the petitioner without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Wasim PS
